Aiden Cross

Director of Digital & Information Services

Meticulous and thorough Enthusiastic about technology Sometimes moves faster than the organisation is ready for Good communicator Standards-driven

Areas of Expertise

  • Government digital transformation
  • Cloud migration and SaaS platforms
  • Citizen-centred design
  • Data governance and privacy
  • Project execution and delivery
  • Quality assurance
  • Change management
  • Systems integration

For Other Topics

  • Ceo: speak with Helen Marchetti
  • Hr: speak with Tony Sparks
  • Finance: speak with Margaret Chen

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Aiden Cross.
